title: Solana Program Activity Monitor
description: Track the on-chain growth of any Solana program — DEX, lending protocol, game, or DePIN — using GoldRush's transaction data on `solana-mainnet`. Fetch daily instruction call count, unique signing wallets per day, week-over-week growth rate, and cumulative user count over any 90-day window. Compare two programs head-to-head on the same metrics. Use for investor due diligence on early-stage protocols, health monitoring dashboards, or surfacing underrated programs with breakout growth before they trend.
useCase: Build a Solana protocol analytics dashboard that tracks daily active users, instruction volume, and week-over-week growth for any program to surface breakout protocols.

keyParams.address: The Solana program address to monitor for activity metrics
keyParams.page_size: Number of transactions to fetch per page for aggregation (max 100)
keyParams.page: Page index for paginating through 90-day transaction history
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Set to true to retrieve oldest-first for chronological aggregation
